title: Kids Create - Children's Safety Scissors - Animal Print Arts & Crafts Scissor Set - Premium Quality - Perfect for School, Office or Home - For Arts and Crafts - Fun Activities for Kids
features: CUTE SCISSORS FOR KIDS: This dynamic duo of funky yet strong scissors are the crafting companion you didn't know you needed. Dependant on which animal they're feeling like channeling that day, your little one can choose from giraffe and zebra scissors. These multi purpose scissors are perfect for creative kids that want to explore artistic boundaries. Practicality and fun combined!

CRAFT SCISSOR: Ideal for getting artistic and creative, these art scissors feature a spacious handle grip, for extra comfort and to ensure a sturdy grip. The stainless steel blades of them are designed to prevent materials from sticking to the blades, giving you a smoother, neater cut. The scissors have small handles - ideal for small hands. Your little ones are sure to have hours of fun cutting out all kinds of shapes!

CREATIVE ACTIVITIES FOR KIDS: This pack of 2 cool scissors, is great for creative kiddos - whether it's for a school project or creative hobbies, these cutting scissors are exceptionally useful. These card making scissors can be drawn on, cut up, bended to make cards, the list is endless! Your kiddos are guaranteed plenty of fun. A fundamental item for any craft box!

SCHOOL ART SUPPLIES: A home craft kit staple, this pack of two scissors are the ultimate papercraft supplies! Great for school and general kids crafts at home, these newest additions to your craft kits are excellent for origami or card and decoration making. These paper cutting scissors are extremely versatile, your crafting options are limitless! Whether they're for a little artist or student, we've brought you a fun staple to bring excitement to crafting sessions

KIDS CRAFT RANGE: The new and exciting 'Core Activity Collection' range from Kids Create provides over 80 products, including colouring, painting, craft & dough products. Designed for age 3 plus, these toys are the perfect way to stimulate senses and aid learning and development from a young age. Creativity and art is known to reduce anxiety and stress, therefore, these toys are the perfect remedy for your little ones. wonderful family activities, these masks are a great way to entertain all!
